title: Integrated question task
objective: Usar what, where, who, when, why y how en una conversación.

activities.prompt: What is your name? Where do you live? Why do you study English?
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha name, live y study English.

activities.correct_answer: How do you travel to work?

activities.prompt: What? Where? Who? When? Why? How?
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica cada palabra con su significado.

activities.prompt: Who is Maria? She is a teacher. Where does she work? At a school. When does she work? In the morning.
activities.question: When does Maria work?

activities.prompt: Write six questions, one with each wh-word, and answer them.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa qué tipo de información pide cada palabra.

activities.prompt: Ask the AI six questions and answer its six questions about identity, place, time, reason and method.
activities.feedback_correct: La IA evalúa variedad y naturalidad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA ofrece una pista sobre el tipo de información.

activities.prompt: Ask a real or fictional person six questions and summarize the answers.
activities.feedback_correct: Usaste preguntas para obtener información nueva.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la wh-word según la respuesta que necesitas.

activities.prompt: Conduct a six-question interview and answer follow-up questions without reading a script.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Repasa la palabra interrogativa asociada al tipo de información.
